name: Trending Sound Remix
description: Audio-first short-form: take a currently trending sound (TikTok/Reels) and overlay your niche interpretation on top. 7-25s, 9:16. Audio starts at frame 0 (no intro silence — that's the algo cheat code), visuals are cut to beat-drops, a short text overlay tells the viewer your angle. The trending sound IS the music — no ElevenLabs Music. Reference-required: the user must supply the trending audio (URL or file). AI cannot pick or license the trend. Algorithm window is 24-48h after the sound starts trending; missing the window collapses reach.

stackSummary.sourceAudio: USER-SUPPLIED trending audio (TikTok/Reels link the agent fetches via `ralphy ref pull --url <url> --audio-only` using yt-dlp under the hood, or a direct .mp3/.m4a/.wav file dropped into the project). The trend is ephemeral (3-7d to peak) — AI does not pick it.
stackSummary.keyframes: google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview via OpenRouter, one keyframe per beat-segment (3-8 total). Niche-specific subject, consistent visual register across shots.
stackSummary.i2v: kwaivgi/kling-v3.0-pro via OpenRouter, short i2v clips (1-3s each) per beat-segment, generate_audio: false (the trending sound is the audio bed; clip-internal audio is muted in composition).
stackSummary.voiceover: OPTIONAL only — ElevenLabs eleven_multilingual_v2 for a single niche-explainer beat if the trend audio has a quiet pocket and the angle needs a spoken line. Default is no VO; let the trend audio carry.
stackSummary.music: NONE. The trending sound IS the music. Do not call ElevenLabs Music for this template.
stackSummary.captions: NONE by default — trending sounds usually don't need transcription. A single text overlay (1-2 short lines, large bold sans-serif, top of frame) is rendered via Remotion `<AbsoluteFill>` + a styled `<div>`, not via the captions pipeline.
stackSummary.composition: Remotion composition reads the audio waveform and beat-timestamps from a small `beats.json` the agent writes during prompt-gen. Each clip is exactly one beat-segment long. Audio plays from frame 0 with zero leading silence.

constants.structure: 0-1s audio-immediate + first beat-cut → 1-Ns beat-synced visuals → last beat hold OR loop-restart
constants.audioRule: no intro silence — audio MUST start at frame 0
constants.cutRule: every shot change lands on a kick / snare / vocal-peak timestamp from beats.json
constants.textOverlayRule: 1-2 lines max, top of frame, large bold sans-serif, present for the full duration

variationAxes: niche (any — beauty, cooking, fitness, B2B SaaS, real estate, fashion, finance, pets…)
duration tier (7-10s tight loop / 12-18s standard / 20-25s extended)
doNotCopyLiterally: The trending sound itself, exact text overlay, and the niche subject. Vibe and structure only — the structure is evergreen, the sound is throwaway.
referenceNotes: Trending audio is REQUIRED and ephemeral (3-7 days to peak). The user must supply EITHER (a) a TikTok/Reels URL the agent pulls audio from via `ralphy ref pull --url <url> --audio-only`, OR (b) a direct audio file dropped at `workspace/projects/<id>/assets/uploaded/`. AI cannot auto-detect the current trend (training is stale) and cannot license a song on the user's behalf. If the audio is post-peak (>48h after it started trending), refuse and recommend `10-music-video` for original-music formats.
